series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains journal entries on property acquired for roadway purposes through appropriation prior to March 2012. As of March 2012 ODOT is no longer creating and maintaining Director Journal Entries related to appropriation actions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: All paper documents up through March 2012 will be microfilmed, paper may be destroyed after microfilm has been checked for quality and completenss. After this date journals will no longer be created. ; Microform: Retain microfilm permanently., Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Permanent
